subject: docs: note single-environment alpha convention (prod = test = dev)
body:
The single Vercel deployment from main is today's only environment.
Future sessions shouldn't start gating behaviors on NODE_ENV, adding
"production" guards, stripping DebugPill for prod, or suggesting
separate staging URLs — those are all out of scope until the user
explicitly signals the transition.

- CLAUDE.md: new "Alpha Phase — Single Environment" section sitting
  alongside the existing "Alpha Phase — Breaking Changes" note. Same
  framing (don't overengineer for alpha). Explicit list of behaviors
  to avoid plus the concrete signal to watch for.

- docs/TODO.md: new "Ideas / Future" entry marking the prod-transition
  checklist (DebugPill gating, env-aware logging, previews, CSP,
  manifest copy, staging URL, localStorage key migration) so when the
  signal comes, the revisit list is already written down. Explicit
  "do NOT start proactively" guardrail.

Tags: docs, convention, alpha, deployment
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: alpha-debug-system
Semver: patch

title: note single-environment alpha convention (prod = test = dev)
